two_shell.math432_global_verdict: SUPERSEDED by twoshell-continuum-bound v1.0: the Math432 PASS runs at r=0.005 (not the B1 point r=0.219); the two-shell global no-condensate is redone at r=0.219 there.

claims.name: no_condensate_all_grids
claims.detail: (min_{A>0} dF > 0 for every reading at NG=121,241,481: no enumerated reading beats Reading-H on any amplitude grid)

claims.name: unique_minimum_at_zero
claims.detail: (dF strictly increasing on the valid prefix at the finest grid for every reading: the only minimum is A=0 = Reading-H, so the verdict is not an amplitude-grid artefact)

claims.name: near0_convex_all
claims.detail: (dF'' > 0 across the first interior nodes for every reading: consistent with kappa_R>0, A=0 is a strict convex minimum)

claims.name: continuum_no_condensate
claims.detail: (curvature-chord bound min(v_i,v_{i+1}) - (1/8) M_i delta^2 > 0 on every A>0 interval for every reading: no condensate can hide BETWEEN grid nodes -- a continuum statement, not just grid)

claims.name: dI_kappa_envelope_small
claims.detail: (dI-grid refinement moves kappa_R by < 0.1% for every reading: kappa is controlled w.r.t. the dI knob as well as the M knob)

claims.name: dI_verdict_robust
claims.detail: (the no-condensate verdict min_{A>0} dF > 0 survives the refined dI grid for every reading)

claims.name: twoshell_shells_disjoint
claims.detail: ({110} and {200} share no wavevector: <phi1 phi2>=0 exactly, so the quadratic cross-term kappa_12 vanishes and the (0,0) Hessian is diagonal)

claims.name: twoshell_110_eigenvalue_positive
claims.detail: (the {110} (0,0) eigenvalue = single-shell BCC curvature kappa_BCC=5.1162 > 0; the SOFT eigenvalue is kappa_{{200}}~3.86 -- see twoshell-continuum-bound v1.0, which corrects the soft direction)

claims.name: twoshell_kernel_penalty_positive
claims.detail: ({200} carries kernel penalty C*q0^4=0.2140 > 0 (one octave off the kernel minimum); NOTE this kernel offset does NOT order the curvatures -- twoshell-continuum-bound v1.0 finds kappa_{{200}}~3.86 < kappa_{{110}}~5.16 ({200} is SOFTER, fewer modes + dressing). Both eigenvalues > 0 so the (0,0) Hessian is PD)

claims.name: sanity_cont_lb_below_minpos
claims.detail: (the continuum lower bound is <= the grid min for every reading: the bound is conservative)
